content.en:
Ye Tian only felt that his ultimate will had crossed the ultimate space-time, and after breaking through a layer of ultimate space-time particles, he suddenly descended into a weaker body.

Immediately afterward, the will returned, but became extremely weak.

At this moment, his state is as if he has traveled through time, but in fact, this should be a piece of time and space in the past.

According to his current preliminary judgment, he should be located in a tribe, and the creatures of this tribe are humanoid, but they have two horns on their heads, and their physical bodies are extremely terrifying.

To his shock, there was a rudimentary form of the ultimate particle in his body.

In terms of strength, his physical body should be equivalent to a weaker Ultimate Realm Lord, and he was just a child of this tribe.

"This heaven and earth is also very wrong, full of rich ultimate particles, as if they can be easily absorbed, use these ultimate particles to refine the body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the days that followed, he was here to learn about the situation in this world.

Soon, he gradually understood this side of the world.

"The Abyss of Aromu!"

This is the name of this territory, and the Abyss of Arromu is endless, with many tribes, each of which has many people.

"The Abyss of Aromu!"

Ye Tian thought of the crystal of the Luo mother, maybe it was the same as the abyss of the Luo mother.

"Could it be that this is the era of those ultimate ancient demons?"

Ye Tian thought.

If that's the case, maybe he'll get some benefit here.

After all, the Ultimate Ancient Demon was so powerful, there might be something worth learning from him.

So, he's ready to really fit in.

The tribe he is currently in is called the Eagle Tribe, and there are more than 30,000 people in total.

According to the division of strength in this era, it can be spent as soldier-level, general-level, king-level, emperor-level, and ancient demon!

The Ancient Demon is the true top existence of the Abyss of Aromu, and it can enter the core area of the Abyss of Aromu, while others cannot enter there.

And at this moment, Ye Tian is just a child of an ordinary tribe in the Abyss of Arrowmu, and he is not even a soldier.

As a child, it was difficult for him to get in touch with too many things.

After a period of time, he grew older and gradually came into contact with the cultivation system of this era.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the library of the Eagle Ministry, where many inheritances were stored.

Ye Tian casually chose a inheritance and looked at it, and after reading it, he was shocked.

"The inheritance of this era actually involves the use of ultimate particles~!" Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

In his time, the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord only involved the perception and use of the ultimate particles, and the real use had to be the ultimate extreme master.

And the starting knowledge here is applied to the ultimate particle, but his physique at that time was different, and he didn't have the ultimate particle aspect at all, and he couldn't perceive the ultimate particle.

And in this era, ultimate particles can be seen everywhere.

"Times have changed, and in my time, I can't see any traces of this era at all. But those Ultimate Ancient Demons were asleep, and they didn't really die, maybe it was something that happened in this era that caused all those Ultimate Ancient Demons to fall asleep. "

"However, there is still something left, and the crystal of Arromu should have been passed down from this era to my time. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the days that followed, he studied the inheritance here, which had more benefits for him, even if the inheritance here was still relatively ordinary, but at least it could give him a deeper understanding of the use of the ultimate particle.

At this time.

Ye Tian was already at the level of a soldier, his strength was even stronger than that of an ordinary Ultimate Realm Lord, and he also knew many ultimate arcane arts, and now he had perfected them one by one to fit the Dao of this era.

Therefore, his real combat power is much more terrifying than that of ordinary generals.

"God, let's go hunting in the Void Demon Valley, do you want to go?"

A sturdy young man came to Ye Tian and asked.

Void Demon Valley, a place that is not dangerous, but there are many Void Demon Beasts living in it, and the coming-of-age ceremony of the tribe is to kill a Void Demon Beast.

The strength of the Void Demon Beast is a soldier-level, and only a very few people have the strength of a general.

It is rumored that there are still good things in the depths of the Void Demon Valley, but the people of the Eagle Department never go deep into the Void Demon Valley, and only hunt on the periphery.

As long as you hunt a virtual demonic beast, you can say that you are an adult when you come back, and if you can't hunt it all the time, you will never be an adult.

Ye Tian agreed.

After that, Ye Tian and this young man, that is, Sui, in the tribe, and several other young people, went to the Void Demon Valley.

Everyone is holding a weapon, and Ye Tian's weapon is a long knife, this knife is not ordinary, in his time, it is the ultimate weapon Gong.

Because this long knife was made of ultimate metal, which was extremely rare in his time, but it was everywhere in this era.

Of course, the physical bodies of the creatures of this era are very tough, even if they are the same cultivation, the physical bodies of this era are much more terrifying than the physical bodies of his era, and the defensive power is too terrifying.

Soon.

They came to the Valley of the Void Demons.

At this time, Ye Tian sensed an extremely rich ultimate particle, enveloping the entire Void Demon Valley.

"Let's go in together, don't go deep, it's on the periphery, let's hunt a Void Demon Beast together first, and when we are strong in the future, we will come to hunt the Void Demon Valley alone and complete the coming-of-age ceremony!" Sui proposed.

"Hmm!"

The others agreed, after all, their current strength is still very weak, and naturally joining forces to hunt is the best choice.
